message:
test(fcp-core): pin PolicyRiskCode + PolicyRiskSeverity serde matrix (flywheel_connectors-9xvmc)

Bead asks for ManifestPolicy variants Display + serde. fcp-core has
no type literally named ManifestPolicy; the manifest/policy
classifier surface covers many already-pinned enums (PolicyPattern +
PolicyEngine routing by kjs08, PolicyBundle hash by j42c7,
PolicyPreviewDecision by zncpi, BudgetEnforcement by b6x37). Two
unpinned policy classifiers in the policy.rs "risk" surface:
- PolicyRiskCode (policy.rs:857) — 12-variant risk-flag classifier
  emitted by policy diffs, with rename_all snake_case + Ord +
  PartialOrd + Hash
- PolicyRiskSeverity (policy.rs:874) — 4-variant severity classifier
  Low/Medium/High/Critical with rename_all snake_case + Ord +
  PartialOrd

Coverage:
- PolicyRiskCode per-variant JSON tag pinned for all 12 variants
  (principal_allow_expanded / connector_allow_expanded /
  capability_allow_expanded / capability_ceiling_expanded /
  capability_deny_reduced / role_expanded / egress_expanded /
  transport_derp_enabled / transport_funnel_enabled /
  transport_lan_enabled / integrity_lowered /
  confidentiality_lowered) with policy-diff audit-log regression
  sentinel
- JSON+CBOR round-trip per variant; CBOR encodes as Text
- Every variant is multi-word; tokens use underscore not hyphen or
  camelCase, lowercase ASCII a-z + _
- PascalCase + camelCase + kebab-case + unknown rejected
- 12-variant count + pairwise distinctness
- PolicyRiskCode Ord follows declaration order (sentinel against
  reorderings)
- PolicyRiskSeverity per-variant JSON tag (low/medium/high/critical)
- JSON+CBOR round-trip; PascalCase + cross-vocabulary rejected
- 4-variant count
- PolicyRiskSeverity Ord follows Low<Medium<High<Critical via
  cmp/partial_cmp truth table; max returns higher; sort orders
  ascending
- Cross-enum: PolicyRiskSeverity::Critical shares the "critical"
  token with RiskLevel/SafetyTier (intentional collision since
  each lives in its own field)
- HashMap-key viability for PolicyRiskCode (Hash + Eq + Copy)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
